modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble creating a meeting request in Outlook

full_description_text:  
So, I was trying to set up a meeting in Outlook, you know, like when you want to get everyone together? But I just couldn't figure out how to make that meeting request thingy work. I clicked around a lot, but nothing happened, and it was really confusing. I think I might have missed something, but I'm not sure what it was!
short_description: Trouble creating a meeting request in Outlook
